tasks.title: Make startExtraction idempotent per draft + widen StartExtractionResult.status union
tasks.dod: A duplicate startExtraction returns the existing job with no second row; a failed/absent latest creates a fresh queued job; StartExtractionResult.status is the queued|running|completed union and the controller returns it at 202.

tasks.title: Backend integration test — idempotent start returns existing job (QG-3)
tasks.dod: Integration test against real MySQL asserts a duplicate startExtraction returns the same jobId with row count 1, and a failed latest triggers a fresh queued job.

tasks.title: Refactor CastConfirmModal into a backdrop+centered dialog wrapper (every state)
tasks.dod: Every modal state renders inside a role=dialog backdrop+centered shell with focus-on-mount and Esc/backdrop close; no branch renders loose inline buttons (0 stray-buttons).

tasks.title: Modal states — in-progress / proposal-ready / completed-empty
tasks.dod: in-progress shows 'being prepared' with no confirm; completed-empty shows a distinct 'nothing to generate references for' close-only body; proposal-ready is the only state exposing the confirm action.

tasks.title: New useCastAutostart(draftId) hook + widen client return type
tasks.dod: On mount with no existing extraction the hook issues exactly one silent start; an existing job issues none; an in-flight guard suppresses the re-mount POST; polling stops on terminal status; startCastExtraction client return type widened to the union.

tasks.title: Wire useCastAutostart + manual control into StoryboardPage
tasks.dod: Step-2 entry auto-starts the free extraction without opening the modal; re-entry starts nothing new; the manual control always opens the modal and surfaces the existing extraction; local castExtraction state and ad-hoc poll are removed in favour of the hook query.

tasks.title: Frontend UI regression — no stray buttons, no duplicate, consent preserved
tasks.dod: Regression asserts 0 stray-buttons across all modal states, a single extraction start across repeated Step-2 entries, and confirmCast firing only from proposal-ready on explicit confirm.
